refactorings_applied: Extract validateImagePath() from POST handler for SRP and readability
Fix inconsistent use of body.content vs trimmedContent in CLI send, DB save, and orphan detection
Use getMimeTypeByExtension() in ATTACHABLE_IMAGE_ACCEPT to eliminate DRY violation
Reduce redundant type casts in isImageCapableCLITool type guard
Fix misplaced JSDoc comment for validateImageContent function
commits: bc56a8f: refactor(image-attachment): improve code quality for Issue #474
message: Refactoring completed. Extracted imagePath validation into dedicated function (SRP), fixed inconsistent trimmedContent usage, eliminated DRY violation in ATTACHABLE_IMAGE_ACCEPT, simplified type guard, and fixed orphaned JSDoc.
